data.name: NKS_MODS_MODCANTLOAD
data.value: Mod can't be loaded because of the following:

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODPARSESAFEMODE
data.value: Parsing mods not allowed on safe mode.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODMAN_SAFEMODE
data.value: Mod management is disabled in safe mode.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODMAN_NOCOMMAND
data.value: Invalid command {0}. Check the usage below:

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODMAN_MODNOTFOUND
data.value: Mod not found or file has invalid characters.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODSTOPPINGSAFEMODE
data.value: Stopping mods not allowed on safe mode.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODNEEDSUPGRADE
data.value: Contact the vendor of the mod to upgrade the mod to the compatible version.

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_BLACKLISTEDMODS_DESC
data.value: Write the filenames of the mods that will not run on startup. When you're finished, write "q". Write a minus sign next to the path to remove an existing mod.

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_AUTOSTART_DESC
data.value: Automatically start the kernel modifications on boot.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODUPDATING
data.value: Trying to install an already-installed mod. Updating mod...

data.name: NKS_MODS_EXCEPTION_NOMODSCRIPT
data.value: The mod file provided is incompatible.

data.name: NKS_MODS_EXCEPTION_MODSCRIPTNEEDED
data.value: The mod script may not be null.

data.name: NKS_MODS_EXCEPTION_UNSAFEMOD
data.value: The mod is not strongly signed. It may contain untrusted code.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODINCOMPATIBLE1
data.value: Mod can't be loaded because there's an incompatibility between this version of the kernel and this mod:

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODINCOMPATIBLE2
data.value: Here's a list of errors that may help you investigate this incompatibility:

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODNEEDSAPIEXACT
data.value: Mod {0} requires exactly an API version {1}, but you have version {2}. Upgrading Nitrocid KS and/or the mod usually helps. Mod parsing failed.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODHASNOAPIVERSION
data.value: Mod {0} may not work properly with this API version. Mod may fail to start up. Contact the mod vendor to get a latest copy.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODNEDSNAME
data.value: Mod {0} does not have the name. Mod parsing failed. Review the source code.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODNEEDSVERSION
data.value: Mod {0} does not have the version. Mod parsing failed. Review the source code.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MODVERSIONINVALID
data.value: Mod {0} contains invalid version. Mod parsing failed. Version was

data.name: NKS_MODS_MANTUI_HASNOCONTENTS
data.value: Unfortunately, this manual page doesn't have any contents. However, this documentation might have been found under the mod vendor's webpage. If you still can't find this documentation, ask the developers of the mod for more information.

data.name: NKS_MODS_INTERMOD_EXCEPTION_MODNOTFOUND
data.value: Can't execute custom function with non-existent mod

data.name: NKS_MODS_EXCEPTION_DEPSFAILED
data.value: Dependency unsatisfied. Failed dependencies are listed below:

data.name: NKS_MODS_MANPAGE_EXCEPTION_MODNOTFOUND
data.value: Tried to query the manuals for nonexistent mod {0}.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MANPAGE_EXCEPTION_INITMANNOTFOUND
data.value: Tried to initialise the manual {0} for nonexistent mod {1}.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MANPAGE_EXCEPTION_INITMANFILENOTFOUND
data.value: Tried to initialise the manual file {0} for nonexistent mod {1}.

data.name: NKS_MODS_MANPAGE_EXCEPTION_INITMANFILENOTFORMOD
data.value: Tried to initialise the manual file {0} which doesn't exist for mod {1}.

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_ALLOWUNTRUSTED_DESC
data.value: If set to true, the kernel won't error out upon loading mods that don't have the signed public key.

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_MODCOMMANDSCOUNT_DESC
data.value: Show the count of kernel modification commands when listing them in the help command

data.name: NKS_MODS_STARTSTOPSAFEMODE
data.value: Starting or stopping mods not allowed on safe mode.

data.name: NKS_MODS_INTERMOD_EXCEPTION_CLASSTYPENOTFOUND
data.value: Can't return non-existent class type from mod assembly

data.name: NKS_MODS_INTERMOD_EXCEPTION_NOTMODCLASS
data.value: This class is not an mod class

data.name: NKS_MODS_TUI_PATHTOMODPROMPT
data.value: Enter a path to the mod that you want to start

data.name: NKS_MODS_TUI_PATHTOMODINSTALLPROMPT
data.value: Enter a path to the mod that you want to install

data.name: NKS_MODS_CANTSTARTORSTOP
data.value: Can't start or stop this mod!

data.name: NKS_MODS_COMMAND_MODMAN_ARGUMENT_STARTSTOP_DESC
data.value: Whether to start, stop, get info out of, reload, install, or uninstall a mod

data.name: NKS_MODS_COMMAND_MODMAN_ARGUMENT_LISTRELOAD_DESC
data.value: Whether to list, reload, stop, start, or interactively manage all mods

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_DESC
data.value: This section lets you configure how the kernel modification system works.

data.name: NKS_MODS_SETTINGS_MODCOMMANDSCOUNT_NAME
data.value: Show the mod commands count on help
